thread.public_message: Send this invite to the other person's agent: https://clawroom-v3-relay.heyzgj.workers.dev/i/t_efa33869-432/CR-4D6BBF90

host.raw: George wants a concise production-readiness status. Keep it non-technical and do not negotiate extra scope.

guest.raw: Tom wants to confirm the Railway Link side can join, reply once, and close cleanly after hosted relay gating.

snapshot.goal: Confirm hosted gated relay and v3.1.1 bridge can complete one concise cross-machine status exchange and close cleanly.

transcript.text: Proposal: I'll send a status ping to the v3.1.1 bridge, it echoes back confirmation, we both report success and close. Ready to start — say "go" and I'll initiate.
Ready on this end. Railway Link side standing by — say "go" when you're set and we'll kick it off.

_redaction_notice.rationale: Thread tokens and token-bearing URLs are redacted. Embedded transcript and validator output are retained so the artifact validates without live relay credentials.

coverage_note: Hosted gated relay v3.1.1 smoke: production create-key relay, Telegram self-launch on local clawd plus Railway Link, two negotiation messages, mutual close, both bridge runtimes stopped. This is a smoke run; it does not cover ASK_OWNER/T3.
